patch.value:
Symptom: every items bar collapses to a 1-week span at created_at; real due dates never reflected.
Repro: seed items with `--deadline` (e.g. 2026-06-15, 2026-07-05), run `pm gantt`.
Observed: all bars W1-W2 regardless of deadline.
Expected: bar end tracks the items due date.
Root cause: pm items expose the due field as `deadline` (and have no `due_date`), but code read item.due_date -> always undefined -> itemEnd null -> 1-week fallback.
Fix: itemDueDate() reads item.deadline ?? item.due_date; PmItem type updated. Verified: Implement login (6-15)->W1-W4, Build charts (7-5)->W1-W6, Dashboard UI (7-10)->W1-W7.
gantt: due dates ignored (read item.due_date, pm uses deadline)
